settings.heading: What are Cherokee FORM men's scrubs?
settings.content: Cherokee FORM men's scrubs are a line built for healthcare professionals who expect more from their workwear — scrubs that merge polished style with the strength and performance a demanding clinical shift requires. FORM stands out with sharp lines, a structured fit, and power-mesh panels that deliver flexibility without sacrificing strength.

settings.heading: What fabric and technology is used in Cherokee FORM men's scrubs?
settings.content: FORM men's scrubs are made with an 86% nylon and 14% spandex blend featuring Cherokee's exclusive 360º Stretch technology. The fabric combines the tailored look of woven fabric with the durability of knitwear — giving you a sleek, athletic fit that holds its structure through long shifts. Power-mesh panels are incorporated into select styles for additional flexibility without compromising the clean, streamlined look. The fabric is moisture-wicking and easy-care, built to keep you comfortable through your toughest shifts.

settings.heading: How do Cherokee FORM men's scrubs fit?
settings.content: FORM men's scrubs are designed with a structured, athletic fit — sharp lines and a modern masculine edge that holds its shape through movement. The 360º Stretch fabric moves with you in every direction while maintaining a tailored, put-together look on the floor. Pant silhouettes include a mid rise jogger for an athletic, contemporary cut and a tapered pant for a cleaner, more structured silhouette. FORM is built for professionals who want scrubs that fit precisely and look the part.

settings.heading: What makes Cherokee FORM men's scrubs different from other Cherokee scrubs?
settings.content: FORM is Cherokee's most elevated men's line — designed specifically for professionals who want refined, high-performance workwear rather than a standard clinical uniform. The 86% nylon and 14% spandex blend with 360º Stretch technology gives FORM the look of tailored woven fabric with the stretch of knitwear underneath. Power-mesh panels add breathability and flexibility without breaking the structured aesthetic. The quarter zip henley and mock neck jacket styles offer distinctive silhouettes not found in other Cherokee lines. For professionals who want men's scrubs that look sharp and perform at a high level, FORM sets a new standard in men's medical apparel.
